episodes.title: How a RM187 Million Halal Empire Hid Malaysia’s Darkest Secret | The GISBH Cult Scandal
episodes.description:
The terrifying true story of Global Ikhwan Services and Business Holdings (GISBH)—a RM187 million multinational empire built on the weaponization of faith, absolute obedience, and the ultimate betrayal of public trust.

For 27 years, across 20 countries, millions of customers in Malaysia, Singapore, and Southeast Asia bought their bread, ate at their restaurants, and supported their charities, believing they were funding a pious, Muslim-run success story. But behind the clean storefronts lay the dark legacy of the banned Al-Arqam cult, resurrected in secret under the guise of corporate capitalism.

In September 2024, the Royal Malaysia Police launched "Op Global," raiding 20 welfare homes and exposing the horrific reality: 625 children trapped in a sealed world, subjected to physical abuse, forced child labor, and systemic assault.

This documentary breaks down how a cult leader's ghost continued to command absolute power, how billions in public goodwill funded luxury lifestyles, and why 49 warning reports were ignored for over a decade.

📌 If you or someone you know was affected by GISBH or any organization linked to Al-Arqam, please reach out to these support channels:
• Talian Kasih: 15999
• UNICEF Malaysia Child Helpline: 1800-18-CHILD
